8,873 reviews. 4.8 stars. Bãi Khem's best-rated resort keeps delivering.

Premier Residences Phu Quoc Emerald Bay sits right on one of Phu Quoc's cleanest beaches. 5 restaurants on-site. Full spa. Fitness center. Free breakfast included.

This is the property locals point every guest toward when budget isn't the question.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
